text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since I became Nishino Flower's trainer.
Everything is going smoothly, and our time together is well spent.
One day...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, if you want, I brought a bento box for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Actually, my mom taught me this recipe yesterday. And, I wanted
you to try it too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Trainer's a really thorough teacher! I'm having so much fun
during training!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm able to do a little bit more each day, and that makes me want to
work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
"Sounds like you've forged a good relationship with your trainer.
That's wonderful."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! That's why I want to do something for Trainer, but I don't
know where to start. Do you have any advice?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Making a big deal out of things might not work... Oh! How
about this? You can present it as a casual gesture...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You liked the last bento I made, so... Um, if you don't already have
something to eat, that is—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A medley of colorful vegetables and steamed foods jump out at me,
including fried chicken and other items that are delicious even when
they're not piping hot. Each bite tastes of heartwarming home
cooking.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: How... is it? Do you like it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The flavors are just right—I could eat something like this every day. I
tell Nishino Flower exactly that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Every day?! U-understood! Ehehe... I'm glad you liked it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She beams with happiness at having her mother's recipe
complimented. I thank her again and continue to eat with gusto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Today's bento is my dad's favorite. I hope you enjoy it too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I have plans to hang out with some friends, so I'll see you later.
Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a bow, she races away. I'm happy about the bento box, but I
also wonder if she isn't overexerting herself just to make them.
choice_data_list: Did she take my words yesterday literally?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she took what I said about being able to eat her food every
day to heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If this is going to be a regular thing, then the least I could do is pay
for the ingredients. I'm eating the lunch box in the trainer's office
when...

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You hard at work as always? Are you free for lunch? I figured we
could catch up. If you're down for that, we're meeting by the main
gate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's one of the senior trainers who took me under her wing. I'm starting
to feel stuffed from my meal, but I also don't want to refuse the offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I shovel the last of the food into my mouth and dash toward the
academy gates.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I hope today's lunch box went over well. I know they're Dad's
favorite foods, but I hope Trainer likes them too.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(What should I make tomorrow? I'm sure Mom will be happy to share
another one of her recipes...)

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer A
text_block_list.text: You all right? You hardly ate a thing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...? Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I learned a lot about training and how to improve partnerships with
our Umamusume from my colleagues. I want to thank them for inviting
me to lunch, but my stomach can't take any more.

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, don't force yourself to talk. Are you coming down with
something? Sorry—we wouldn't have invited you if we'd known.
choice_data_list: No. I'm the one who should apologize.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Could it be?
